title: hieracium carolinianum subsp. domingense
intro: Hieracium carolinianum subsp. domingense, also known as the Hawkweed plant, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and reducing fever. The health benefits of Hieracium carolinianum subsp. domingense include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Hawkweed can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
